summary: Created personalization engine for N5OS Bootstrap with configuration system, template engine, and instance-specific file generation. Implemented defaults.yaml, instance configs (zoputer.yaml, example.yaml), personalize.py script, and Jinja2-like templates for CLAUDE.md and session-context.md generation.
learnings: Template engine without Jinja2 dependency can handle basic conditional blocks, for loops, and filters. Key was processing loops before variable substitution and handling {{ var | filter }} patterns within loop content.
